Name: Average time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR and the next activity in variants that include Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Minimum time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR when it occurs after Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to be followed by a rejection (any rejection activity) compared to being followed by an approval
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR and the end of the case

Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR in process variants that eventually lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total waiting time to Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR when the prior activity is Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR in variants where both occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to Request Payment in successful variants (ending in Payment Handled)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average cycle time of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR in cases that previously experienced a rejection by any role versus those that did not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR and the end of the case

Name: Total time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to the end of the case (Payment Handled or final rejection) grouped by whether the variant includes a prior Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to occur after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in variants that later result in Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants without any prior rejections versus variants with at least one prior rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to the next occurrence of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in rework loops involving Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR when the case originates from a domestic declaration (inferred from context in description) versus other types
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR and the end of the case
